Drug.description: Medication, active substance, chemotherapy drug, targeted therapy, or pharmacological agent.

Condition.description: Disease, diagnosis, clinical condition, cancer type, subtype, complication, or syndrome.

Procedure.description: Medical intervention, treatment phase, diagnostic procedure, surgery, monitoring action, or care protocol.

Symptom.description: Clinical sign, symptom, toxicity, side effect, or patient-observed manifestation.

AnatomicalStructure.description: Body part, organ, tissue, cell type, or anatomical location.

DosageRegimen.description: Dose, frequency, duration, route, schedule, cycle, or treatment regimen.

LabTest.description: Laboratory test, biomarker test, imaging test, cytogenetic analysis, PCR, FISH, or diagnostic measurement.

Organization.description: Medical institution, authority, guideline publisher, clinical group, or regulator.

Other.description: Fallback class for entities that do not fit another class.

causes.description: A drug may cause a symptom or adverse event.

contraindicated_for.description: A drug is contraindicated for a condition.

part_of.description: A procedure or phase is part of another procedure or protocol.

diagnosed_by.description: A condition is diagnosed by a test or diagnostic procedure.

dosage_is.description: A drug has a dosage or regimen.

related_to.description: Fallback relation for weak or general associations.
